title: suffrenia dichotoma
intro: Suffrenia dichotoma, also known as the Himalayan knotweed or Himalayan fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. Its roots, leaves, and stems are used in traditional medicine, primarily for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Suffrenia dichotoma can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
